title: pabstiella atrata
intro: Pabstiella atrata, also known as the purple beard lichen, is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Peltigeraceae. This plant is primarily composed of fungal hyphae that grow among algal cells and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pabstiella atrata include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Pabstiella atrata can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or mixing it with other herbs to create topical creams or ointments.
